final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color + secondary color + typography specification showcase for the fragrance brand 染秋 (RAN QIU).

Style/medium: needs a "东方美学" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 color theory and muted earth tones, 故宫文创 contemporary heritage branding, Kinfolk magazine minimalist editorial style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a clean brand guideline layout showing primary color swatch, secondary color swatches, and typography samples in organized sections
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" as the focal identity element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: must reflect autumn-inspired tones drawn from 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)" as brand wordmark, "桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色" as product line names
Constraints: must preserve all Chinese characters exactly as provided, color system must align with 秋季/东方香料 brand positioning
Avoid:
